summary: TTS | Details Tab from Line Score
description:
GIVEN TTS is enabled
AND the user is in the video player

steps.action:
WHEN focus is in the line score
AND the user navigates to the "Details" tab
steps.result: THEN the user should hear "Details, <x> of <y> Options, Press up for player controls, Press down to navigate innings, Press <appropriate_directions> for more options, Press back to dismiss controls."
